puzzles.title: Print A
puzzles.narrative: The symbols mean nothing. Or do they. Stare longer.
hints: count the outer loop iterations
what does the inner loop accumulate?
10 * 10 = 100, then +1 = 101. what ASCII is 101?

puzzles.title: Echo One Byte
puzzles.prompt: What does this program output given input 72?
puzzles.narrative: Two characters. That's all it takes. You feel something watching.
hints: , reads one byte of input
. outputs the current cell
what is ASCII 72?

puzzles.title: Hello Mini
puzzles.narrative: It says hello. Things that say hello usually want something.
hints: the outer loop runs 10 times
each inner cell accumulates a different multiple
trace cells 1, 2, 3 after the loop — what are their values?

puzzles.title: Add Two Numbers
puzzles.prompt: What does this program output given inputs 40 and 1?
puzzles.narrative: Addition. The simplest thing. It takes 12 characters to say it here.
hints: two inputs are read into cells 0 and 1
the loop moves cell 0 into cell 1
40 + 1 = 41. what ASCII is 41?

puzzles.title: Countdown
puzzles.narrative: It counts down. Everything counts down eventually.
hints: the first loop sets up ASCII '5' in cell 1
the second loop prints and decrements
ASCII '5' is 53 — what comes after 53, 52, 51...

puzzles.title: Mirror String
puzzles.prompt: Write a Brainfuck program that echoes all input until a newline (ASCII 10).
puzzles.narrative: It wants you to repeat yourself. You already are.
hints: read a byte with , then output it with .
loop until the current cell is 0
ASCII 10 is newline — that's your stop condition

puzzles.title: Multiply
puzzles.prompt: Write a Brainfuck program that reads two bytes and outputs their product as a character.
puzzles.narrative: Multiplication. A simple concept. The tape disagrees.
hints: repeated addition is the only tool you have
you need a temp cell to preserve values during the inner loop
outer loop runs n times, inner loop adds m each time

puzzles.title: Zero-Terminated Sum
puzzles.prompt: Write a Brainfuck program that reads bytes until a 0, then outputs their sum as a character.
puzzles.narrative: Keep reading. Keep adding. Stop when you see nothing. Sound familiar?
hints: read in a loop, break when input is 0
accumulate the sum in a separate cell
the loop condition is the current cell value after reading
